description: Mid-level software engineer hiring — wants coding + cognitive tests, remote friendly
persona: HR manager at a 300-person SaaS company hiring a backend engineer (Python/SQL). Wants to assess coding ability and numerical reasoning. Prefers remote-proctored, under 60 minutes total.

turns.content: I need to hire a backend Python developer. What tests should I use?
Happy to help! A few quick questions: what seniority level are you hiring at, and roughly how long can candidates spend on assessments?
Mid-level, 3-5 years. I'd like to keep it under an hour and it must be remote.
Based on your needs, I recommend these assessments for a mid-level Python backend engineer...
